author: runner-3
rationale: Input pin only (P2 P-9): resolves the two remaining model-revision placeholders (R3 extension/cascade rung and the HC3/EF3 trained-PRM comparator) to exact Hugging Face revision shas, in the amendment-overlay pin-value format (bare 40-hex revision sha), completing launch gate 3 of poc/f2/README.md. Repo binding (the frozen keys name the role, the sha names the exact snapshot): SmolLM2-1.7B -> repo HuggingFaceTB/SmolLM2-1.7B-Instruct, revision 31b70e2e869a7173562077fd711b654946d38674 (the instruct variant, same frozen family as the amendment-2 R1/R2 pins; P1 scale rungs; design-efficiency-track.md section 4.2); small-process-reward-model -> repo Skywork/Skywork-o1-Open-PRM-Qwen-2.5-1.5B, revision 98d69606595eedbdbbbf0a7d28efdcd462ba6a67. PRM choice rationale (frozen constraint: 'off-the-shelf, matched inference FLOPs, EF3/HC3'; design-efficiency-track.md section 5 Fork 3: 'reuse an off-the-shelf small reward model'): (a) it is the established, documented, ungated (HF API gated=false, private=false), open-weight process-reward model at the <=1.5B-class scale — an HF PRM sweep on 2026-07-08 found every other documented PRM at 7B-72B (Qwen2.5-Math-PRM-7B/72B, RLHFlow Llama3.1-8B-PRM, math-shepherd-mistral-7b-prm, Skywork-o1-Open-PRM-Qwen-2.5-7B), the only other sub-2B candidate (Gen-Verse ReasonFlux-PRM-1.5B) being a far less documented/adopted research artifact; (b) it is exactly the small PRM benchmarked in Liu et al. arXiv:2502.06703 — the paper the frozen efficiency-track record cites for the '1B>405B with PRM-guided TTS' claim that HC3 tests the kernel verifier against — so the comparator is the literature's own instrument, not a strawman; (c) scale: Qwen2.5-Math-1.5B-Instruct backbone (1543714304 params per its safetensors metadata) + PRM head, config architecture Qwen2ForPrmModel (28 layers, hidden 1536), i.e. the same ~1.5-1.7B rung as R3, satisfying the matched-inference-FLOPs note at rung scale with the exact matching done on the F0 ledger (run_prm already books PRM forward FLOPs); (d) licence: Skywork Community License (no gate, no click-through; weights publicly fetchable). Operational notes for the still-to-build real PRM backend (poc/f2/README.md): the checkpoint ships trust_remote_code custom classes (auto_map -> modeling_qwen2_rm.Qwen2ForRewardModel; the custom code is itself pinned by this revision sha) and pytorch_model.bin only (no safetensors file). Both revisions resolved 2026-07-08 from the Hugging Face model API (models/<repo>?expand=sha, cross-checked against models/<repo>/refs branch main — identical for both repos). NO weights were downloaded; weight download + the staged-bytes manifest remains the f2.inputs Modal-harness job, which must load exactly these revisions (from_pretrained revision=<sha>) and echo them in its manifest. For the record, the base (non-instruct) SmolLM2-1.7B repo head on the same date was effd688a12921b4cc83e3312b6feb579f70f9c71 (informational only, not pinned). With this amendment only pins.harness_manifest and the corpus placeholders d-xif / d-ext remain PINNED-AT-INPUTS.
